task: Fix precommit security gate blocker in API smoke support script

changedFiles.change: Replaced broad allowlisted process.env forwarding with an explicit child dev server env containing only BROWSER and NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER.

verification.scenario: local Wave 1 API smoke starts local dev server and runs mutating API assertions
verification.binaryObservable: PASS api smoke; evidence shows health, item fallback, tags filter, favorite, workflow, malformed JSON 400, and cleanup assertions passed.

verification.scenario: remote mutating Wave 1 API smoke refuses non-local base URL
verification.binaryObservable: FAIL api smoke: Refusing mutating Wave 1 API smoke for non-local --base-url: https://example.com

staging.reason: scripts/qa/api-smoke-support.mjs is staged as a new file, but the security fix is currently an unstaged working tree delta over the staged version.

notes: No product API source files were edited.
Existing Wave 1 changes outside the scoped script were not modified.
